title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
